/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/nearby_qml_file_tray_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/file_share_tray_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/file_share_tray_controller.cc.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/file_share_state.cc.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/string_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/status_mapper.cc.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/qr_code_generator.cc.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/notification_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nearby_qml_file_tray_app.dir/nearby_qml_file_tray_app_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources_file_share.cpp.o -o nearby_qml_file_tray_app   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libqrencode.so.4 -lnearby_sharing_api_shared /usr/lib64/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
